scripts.zip:project: find dist -type d \( -name '* 2' -o -name '* 3' \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -f wedding-project.zip && zip -rq wedding-project.zip . -x './node_modules/*' './.venv/*' './.git/*' './wedding-project/*' './.DS_Store' '*/.DS_Store' './tsconfig.tsbuildinfo' './wedding-project.zip' './wedding-project-lean.zip'
scripts.zip:lean: find dist -type d \( -name '* 2' -o -name '* 3' \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -f wedding-project-lean.zip && zip -rq wedding-project-lean.zip . -x './node_modules/*' './.venv/*' './.git/*' './wedding-project/*' './.DS_Store' '*/.DS_Store' './tsconfig.tsbuildinfo' './wedding-project.zip' './wedding-project-lean.zip' './asset-pack/runtime-sources/raw/*' './asset-pack/runtime-sources/sprites/*' './asset-pack/v3_raw/*' './docs/visual-audit/screenshots/*' './docs/visual-audit/smoke/*' './docs/visual-audit/smoke-kaya/*'
